color_palette.rules: No colors allowed except Pure Black and Pure White. Grays only for borders/accents.

style_rules.headings: font-bold tracking-tight text-white uppercase or sentence case

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 border border-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-colors
buttons.outline: bg-transparent text-white border border-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-colors
buttons.whatsapp: fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-50 bg-white text-black p-4 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.3)] hover:scale-110 transition-transform

cards.service: bg-black border border-white/20 p-8 hover:border-white transition-colors group h-full flex flex-col justify-between
cards.pricing: bg-black border border-white p-8 flex flex-col items-center text-center hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors

navigation.style: fixed top-0 left-0 w-full bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/10 z-50 h-20 flex items-center justify-between

images.logo_placeholder: Use text 'ALTERN DIGITAL' in Bold Uppercase

allowed: Simple underline expansions on nav links
No layout shifts, no parallax, no fade-ins

sections: Services: 4 Cards (Custom Software, Web, Mobile, Consulting)

universal_guidelines: Do not use shadows except for the floating WhatsApp button.
Ensure 100% contrast ratio (Black on White / White on Black).
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Images must be grayscale or heavily desaturated via CSS filter: grayscale(100%).
instructions_to_main_agent: Override the css variables in index.css with the provided strict monochrome values. Build the Home page as a single scrollable landing page with id-based navigation. Create separate pages only if explicitly clicked for details, but the main flow is single page. Use Shadcn components for complex UI parts (if any) but style them to be flat and square (radius-none).
